scope: L2 Security: secrets, deps, SAST, supply chain, auth, CI perms, secret scanning

repos_missing_local.phenotype-shared: Not a top-level local repo; exists only as crates/phenotype-shared sub-crate inside PhenoProc. The naming convention phenotype-shared in repos refers to KooshaPari/phenoShared (a separate GitHub org repo containing reusable .github/workflows/reusable/*.yml - verified live via gh API).

secrets_in_code.detail: 0 detections across all 7 local repos via trufflehog filesystem scan.

sast.detail: No CodeQL/Semgrep/Trivy/Grype in any local workflow. Centralized SAST lives in KooshaPari/phenoShared/.github/workflows/reusable/ (sast.yml, codeql.yml, security-scan.yml); only phenotype-journeys consumes it via phenoShared/.github/workflows/reusable/security-scan.yml@f5343b1.

supply_chain_sbom.detail: No repo emits cyclonedx/syft SBOM. focalpoint + phenotype-tooling emit build provenance via actions/attest-build-provenance (release-attestation.yml). No SPDX/CycloneDX artifact.

authn_authz.focalpoint: Per-connector auth.rs (connector-linear); PII scrubber in focus-telemetry. No central auth layer.
authn_authz.thegent: secrets.py + settings.py + cliproxy_manager.py; no OIDC federation.
authn_authz.phenotype-tooling: Tooling binaries; auth out of scope.
authn_authz.phenotype-journeys: Reusable workflow consumer; auth delegated to phenoShared.

ci_least_privilege.detail: All 7 repos declare permissions: at workflow or job scope. Common: contents: read baseline; release jobs scope attestations: write, id-token: write, packages: write. No permissions: write-all observed. phenotype-journeys uses permissions: {} at top-level with job-scoped grants (gold standard).

secret_scanning_in_ci.thegent: None local; has gitleaks.toml but no scanner workflow

focalpoint.rationale: Clean secrets; 1 RustSec (info); 54.5% SHA pin; trufflehog CI; no SAST; build provenance present.

phenotype-infra.rationale: Clean secrets; no Rust deps; 89% SHA pin; no SAST/secret scanner; IaC only.

phenotype-tooling.rationale: Clean deps; 68% SHA pin; build provenance; no SAST or secret scanner.

phenotype-journeys.rationale: Reuses phenoShared security-scan.yml (gitleaks + cargo-audit); 86% SHA pin; permissions: {} pattern.

phenotype-landing.rationale: Static sites; 100% SHA pin; minimal scope; SAST/secrets not relevant.

thegent.rationale: Clean deps; 97% SHA pin; gitleaks.toml present but no scanner workflow.

OmniRoute.rationale: 100% SHA pin; gitleaks.toml; 0 cargo vulns; auth in proxy.ts; no local SAST.

top_findings.finding: Action SHA pin coverage 54.5% (12/22); 10 actions on moving tags.
Action SHA pin coverage 68.2% (15/22); 7 unpinned actions.
No repo (except phenotype-journeys) runs CodeQL or Semgrep. Centralized SAST exists in KooshaPari/phenoShared but unused by 6/7 local repos.
No SBOM (CycloneDX/SPDX) generated or attached to releases. Only build provenance on focalpoint + phenotype-tooling.
No in-CI secret scanner workflow. gitleaks.toml exists in thegent + OmniRoute but is not executed.
Requested repo not present locally; role filled by KooshaPari/phenoShared (verified live) holding 15 reusable workflows including sast.yml, codeql.yml, security-scan.yml.

recommendations: Migrate remaining workflows to phenoShared reusable security-scan.yml (focalpoint, thegent, OmniRoute, phenotype-tooling, phenotype-infra, phenotype-landing).
Add CodeQL via github/codeql-action/init@v3 SHA-pinned across all 7 repos; enable security-extended query pack.
Add anchore/sbom-action (syft) emitting CycloneDX on release; attach to GitHub Release.
Patch wasmtime-wasi to >=45.x in focalpoint (resolves RUSTSEC-2026-0182).
Convert thegent/OmniRoute gitleaks.toml into a daily gitleaks-action workflow pinned to SHA.
Bring all workflows to 100% SHA pinning; track remaining tag references as hygiene backlog.
